R.Lombardi steps back to pass. Pass incomplete deep right intended for S.Mariner [T.Franklin]. Houston challenged the pass interception and the play was upheld. Timeout #2 by HOU. Michigan challenged the potential foul and the play was upheld. Timeout #2 by MICH.
